bottle girls.title: Bottle Girls
bottle girls.description: Five beautiful women masquerade as bottle girls, traveling state to state, infiltrating some of the most exclusive clubs. When they make everyone comfortable, they rob the club and disappear forever. If they have to kill, they will. Seems like the perfect life — until they are betrayed from within.

bloodline.title: Bloodline
bloodline.keywords: English movie, drama, urban drama, Florida movies, sibling rivalry
bloodline.description: Two brothers, Marcus and Nate have chosen opposite sides of the law. Marcus, a police officer, confronts Nate, the city's biggest drug lord. Marcus is then faced with having to choose between his blood and his duty to protect and serve.

14 days.title: 14 Days
14 days.writers: Temitope Bolade; Diche Enunwa; ChinneyLove Eze
14 days.description: A single mother of one is due for promotion at work, but her new boss seems to be blocking her way.

every day but christmas.title: Every Day But Christmas
every day but christmas.keywords: holiday, christmas, family, black cinema, black holiday, black family, romance, black love
every day but christmas.description: A Christmas-hating author is taken by fate on a ride outside of his comfort zone and back to a place where he will face his fears, find his fate, and ultimately discover the true meaning of Christmas.

the virtual babysitter.title: The Virtual Babysitter
the virtual babysitter.keywords: virtual babysitter, romance, comedy, drama, boss, surrogate mother, covid-19, secret
the virtual babysitter.description: In a COVID-19 world where money is tight and job opportunities are sparse, a cheerful and charismatic woman named Camila struggles to pay the bills. A new opportunity — virtual babysitting — falls into her lap. Being able to relate to the child who lost her mother, Camila builds a strong bond. When the father notices a positive change, a romance begins — until he discovers her dirty little secret.

the last stand.title: The Last Stand
the last stand.keywords: comedy club, stand up comedy, performers, los angeles, hollywood, aspiring comics, friendship, drama
the last stand.description: A drama that chronicles the life of four very different people attempting success as performers in Los Angeles. They meet at a notable Hollywood comedy club — The Last Stand — and form a fast bond. As life pressures mount, their lives start to crumble. One tragic step ends the pain. Through Reggie, TD, Bo and Dede we see the drama of comedy.

a baby for christmas.title: A Baby for Christmas
a baby for christmas.description: At Christmastime none of the Chandlers seem to have the holiday spirit except for Stephanie. As family members struggle with work, parenting and life expectations, a group of kids at an orphanage helps them rediscover the meaning of family and the true spirit of Christmas.

between sisters.title: Between Sisters
between sisters.description: Aneesa's baby sister Serena is getting married and she wants to give her the best wedding present possible. When she discovers they have two other sisters, Serena decides she wants to find them and have them participate in the wedding.

from this day forward.title: From This Day Forward
from this day forward.description: A story of trust and expectations. As a married couple deals with baggage from the past, a newly engaged couple must confront what the future might hold for their relationship.

how to snatch a bachelor.title: How to Snatch A Bachelor
how to snatch a bachelor.writers: Alonzo Anderson, Keisha Armani, Greg Galloway
how to snatch a bachelor.description: Two sisters decide to kidnap a reality star bachelor for their New Year's resolution, but they do not account for the FBI being hot on their trails.

if you really love me.title: If You Really Love Me
if you really love me.description: Three sisters rely on the strength of their faith, love and family to get them through life's challenges.

in god's hands.title: In God's Hands
in god's hands.description: Angie Cartwright was always blessed with a gift for song, but hard times forced her to give up her dream of a music career. Now a single mother hoping to turn her life around, she returns home to face family struggles and rebuild her future.

life of angela.title: Life of Angela
life of angela.description: A young woman battling symptoms of schizophrenia and bipolar disorder is married off to an older man. There she encounters a lover whose presence seems to offer temporary relief from fighting her demons.

love interest.title: Love Interest
love interest.description: Love sparks fly between Dayo and Eniola, an estranged couple in the middle of an out-of-court divorce proceeding. What happens next will determine whether what broke them was stronger than what once bound them.

love me or leave me.title: Love Me or Leave Me
love me or leave me.description: A faith-based family drama blending comedy and music that explores responsibility, relationships, and forgiveness as several lives intersect through love and hardship.

love will keep us together.title: Love Will Keep Us Together
love will keep us together.description: Best friends since childhood, Tao and Bren prepare to live out their dreams of an extravagant double wedding in Hawaii. As their big day approaches, their friendship is tested by jealousy, expectations, and emotional highs and lows.

merry christmas, baby.title: Merry Christmas, Baby
merry christmas, baby.description: Marci throws herself into preparing for Christmas and building her new event-planning business. But when the business gets off to a rocky start and members of her family face their own hardships, Marci steps up to help everyone have a good holiday.

my dad's a soccer mom.title: My Dad's a Soccer Mom
my dad's a soccer mom.description: After being cut from his NFL football team, a man bonds with his young daughter and encourages her to play soccer, learning lessons about family, teamwork, and perseverance.

stock option.title: Stock Option
stock option.description: When a homeless ex-stock broker rescues a famous model from a robbery attempt, she takes him home as an act of gratitude.

sugar mommas.title: Sugar Mommas
sugar mommas.description: Sisters Sheila and Lynn have little in common except their love for sweets. In need of a change, they partner with their close friend Tommi to open a bakery.

the choirmaster's wife.title: The Choirmaster's Wife
the choirmaster's wife.keywords: Nollywood, Nigerian drama, romance, african movies, african entertainment, culture, comedy, african romance

the best men.title: The Best Men
the best men.keywords: Nollywood, Nigerian drama, romance, african movies, african entertainment, culture
the best men.description: Mary visits her online boyfriend and shares a first kiss with his flatmate, mistaking him for her boyfriend.

what would you do for love.title: What Would You Do for Love
what would you do for love.description: Reggie Brooks is a fitness trainer whose good looks have overshadowed the fact that he lives paycheck to paycheck. After being notified that he has come into a large sum of money, Reggie keeps his new multi-millionaire status a secret while going on a dating blitz to find a wife within 30 days.

where's the love?.title: Where's the Love?
where's the love?.description: As two popular married TV talk show hosts dispense relationship advice, their own marriage begins to crumble.

all about diamond.title: All About Diamond
all about diamond.description: While a young girl named Diamond finds herself in a homeless situation, she's offered a way out by dancing for cash in order to get on her feet and make a better life for herself. As the money comes in she finds being the entertainer is simple. Most challenging for Diamond is understanding how those who said they would show her the way could take advantage of her and steal what she worked so hard to achieve. This pathway opened Diamond's eyes to more than she imagined and took her farther than she wanted to go — but the question is, will she be able to escape the nightlife?

due for love.title: Due For Love
due for love.keywords: urban drama; relationship drama; financial struggle; debt; couple conflict; love and betrayal; street life; crime drama; psychological thriller; black cinema; independent film; family drama; struggling couple; survival; moral dilemma
due for love.description: When Malik and Tip fall in love, building a life together feels within reach — until mounting debt, career setbacks, and a growing family push them to the edge. Desperate to provide, Malik becomes entangled in a dangerous and mysterious opportunity that promises fast money, but at a terrifying cost. As secrets grow and trust begins to fracture, Tip is forced to decide how much she's willing to endure for love, stability, and their child. In a world where survival comes with a price, every decision could be their last.

baby daddy alibi.title: Baby Daddy Alibi
baby daddy alibi.keywords: crime drama; murder mystery; alibi; police investigation; urban thriller; fatherhood; custody; survival; betrayal; street drama; black cinema; independent film; interrogation; detective; corruption; legal drama; suspense; family conflict
baby daddy alibi.description: When Jay Carter becomes the prime suspect in a brutal murder, his world begins to unravel. Determined to protect his freedom and his children, Jay scrambles to construct an airtight alibi — but the deeper he goes, the more the truth slips out of reach. As detectives close in and those closest to him begin to crack under pressure, loyalty turns into leverage and secrets become weapons. In a city where survival means choosing who to trust, one wrong move could cost everything. Baby Daddy Alibi is a tense urban crime drama about lies, loyalty, and the price of protecting your name.
baby daddy alibi.social_handles: Ayanna Shon: Facebook -@ Ayanna Shon , instagram @capturedbyayanna

fatal love.title: Fatal Love
fatal love.keywords: crime drama; urban thriller; robbery; single mother; survival; manipulation; toxic relationship; love and crime; financial struggle; desperation; police investigation; heist; inner city; black cinema; independent film; moral dilemma; tragic love story; suspense
fatal love.description: Lisa Walton is a hardworking single mother pushed to the edge by mounting bills, job loss, and the weight of providing for her family. When she meets Derrick, a charming but troubled man with his own struggles, their connection quickly turns into something deeper — and more dangerous. As desperation grows, the two are drawn into a series of escalating robberies that promise quick money but come at a devastating cost. Fatal Love is a gripping urban crime drama about desperation, manipulation, and the price of trying to escape a life that won't let you go.

livestream stalker.title: Livestream Stalker
livestream stalker.keywords: thriller; stalker; home invasion; livestream; social media; internet fame; kidnapping; suspense; crime thriller; family in danger; surveillance; obsession; psychological thriller; technology danger; online privacy; suburban thriller; independent film; digital age
livestream stalker.description: When a single mother and her two daughters turn their everyday lives into a livestream sensation, what begins as a harmless attempt at fame and financial opportunity quickly spirals into a nightmare. As their audience grows, so does the attention of a disturbed viewer who becomes dangerously obsessed with their family. With access to their routines, home, and private moments, the stalker manipulates, watches, and ultimately strikes — turning their own content into a weapon against them. Livestream Stalker is a tense, modern thriller that explores the dark side of online fame, privacy, and the terrifying consequences of letting the world watch your life.
